---
title: Selecting Variables
subtitle: Narrowing down columns with `select`
format: revealjs
footer: "Data Transformation with `dplyr`"
---

```{r}
#| include: false
source("../setup.R")
```

## Overview

- ...

# The `select()` Function

## The Basic Principle

> `select()` changes the width of a data frame by keeping only the columns you specify.

![](/images/slides/google_slides/select_schema.svg)
